message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram
    participant Client
    participant BnodeApi
    participant Blockchain
    participant Cloud

    Note over Client, BnodeApi: Request
    Note over Client: Request:
    multipart-formdata
    file (binary)
    privatekey_wif (string)
    public_key_hex (string)
    on_chain (boolean)

    Note over Client, BnodeApi: Response:
    code (int)
    file_id (string)
    encrypt_hex (string, encrypt random index list to hex)
    tx_id_list (string of array)

    Note over BnodeApi:
    1.divid upload file.
    2.get divided file array.
    3.genarate random index array.
    4.divided file array is numbering random index.
    5.encrypt genarate random index array to string.
    6.save No.5 string in server.

    Client ->> BnodeApi: uploadFile

    alt [upload to BlockChain]
        loop [divided file array]
            BnodeApi -> Blockchain: upload Divided File(Max 100kb)
            Blockchain <- BnodeApi: (response)
        end
    end

    alt [upload to Cloud]
        loop [divided file array]
            BnodeApi -> Cloud: upload Divided File(Max File size on Config file)
            Cloud <- BnodeApi: (response)
        end
    end

    BnodeApi -> Blockchain: 6.save No.5 string in server.
    Blockchain -> BnodeApi: (response)

    alt [upload to BlockChain]
        Blockchain -> Cloud: 7.calculate file hash and write hash on Blockchain.
        Cloud <- Blockchain: (response)
    end

    BnodeApi -> Client: txid
    Client <- BnodeApi: (response)

@enduml
